name: Kansai Super Market Ltd.
summary: Kansai Super Market Ltd. operates supermarket stores in Japan. It offers fruits and vegetables; alcoholic beverages; and seafood, meat, confectionery, and frozen food products, as well as miscellaneous goods. The company also engages in the production of cooked rice; cultivation and sale of vegetables; and beef cattle fattening activities. It operates 65 supermarket stores and 1 shopping department store. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Itami, Japan.
